name: pnp-sharepoint-skills-style-retro
title: Style: Retro Memphis
shortDescription: Retro Memphis style tokens for the list-styling skill. Hot pink, electric blue, yellow, and teal with colored borders.
longDescription: Retro Memphis style tokens for the list-styling skill. Hot pink, electric blue, yellow, and teal with colored borders — bold, playful, and unapologetically nostalgic.
Use when the user says 'retro,' 'memphis,' '80s,' '90s,' 'colorful,' 'playful,' or 'bright colors.'

thumbnails.alt: Retro Memphis style applied to a SharePoint list

references.name: List Styling Engine
references.description: The companion skill that applies these style tokens to a SharePoint list.

references.name: Demo video
references.description: Walkthrough of the list-styling engine and supporting style token skills.
